query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN publishedToFeed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as feed_published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as model_published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN modelTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN modelAwayScore IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_scores,
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayRunLineOdds IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_rl_odds
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'MLB';

  SUM(CASE WHEN modelAwayScore IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_scores,
